caption: The video features Rishi Yadav, CEO of InfoObjects, speaking at an event related to Big Data SV 2015. He is seated in front of a backdrop that prominently displays "theCUBE" and "siliconANGLE," indicating the setting is likely a tech or data-focused conference. Rishi is wearing a blue shirt with the InfoObjects logo on it and has a microphone attached to his ear, suggesting he is either being interviewed or giving a presentation. The scene appears professional and well-organized, with a focus on discussing topics relevant to big data and technology. The lower third of the screen provides additional information about Rishi, including his Twitter handle "@meditativesoul."
